message:
chore: close bead ft-3681t.9.2 (swarm command center)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -2844,7 +2844,7 @@
 {"id":"ft-3681t.8.6","title":"[quality] Migration rehearsal and rollback-drill suite","description":"Codify repeatable migration rehearsals that run parity corpus, dual-run shadow comparison, importer validation, cutover checkpoints, and rollback drills before any production migration stage.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Migration rehearsals are automated and repeatable across environments. 2. Rollback drills meet time-to-recovery and data-integrity targets. 3. Cutover criteria are evidence-backed, not subjective. 4. Includes comprehensive unit/integration/e2e migration tests with detailed structured logs/artifacts.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:06.603955Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:38.881880Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["migration","quality-gate","rollback"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:45.407132Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:45.961036Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:46.575869Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:47.071842Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:37.643463Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:47.661535Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:48.242390Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:35:27.383647Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:06.603955Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:43.489007Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:44.115366Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:44.792897Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:48.823112Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:38.881822Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9","title":"[epic] Human operator UX parity and control-cockpit enhancement","description":"# Epic 9: Human Operator UX Parity and Beyond

Ensure FrankenTerm fully replaces NTM's operator-centric ergonomics, not just machine APIs. This epic covers command center UX, live session/state navigation, intervention controls, and workflow authoring ergonomics so operators can manage large swarms safely and efficiently.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Human operator workflows currently handled in NTM have first-class FrankenTerm-native UX paths.
2. UX surfaces are tightly coupled to native mux/orchestrator/policy state (no stale proxy layers).
3. Operator efficiency and safety outcomes are measured and validated through scenario-based testing.
4. Comprehensive unit/integration/e2e coverage with detailed structured logs and artifact capture is enforced for all shipped UX flows.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:54.896702Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T19:30:55.781491Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","ntm-convergence","operator","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:54.896702Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:55.778885Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:56.218811Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:56.656099Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:57.098531Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9.1","title":"[quality] Operator UX scenario validation and usability telemetry suite","description":"Build scenario-driven UX validation for operator workflows (launch, triage, intervention, approval, incident handling, migration oversight) with measurable efficiency/safety metrics.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Critical operator scenarios are executable end-to-end with pass/fail criteria.
2. UX telemetry captures friction, latency, error rates, intervention success, and accessibility regressions.
3. Findings feed backlog and release gates with explicit go/no-go thresholds.
4. Includes comprehensive unit/integration/e2e UX tests with detailed structured logs/artifacts.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:02:06.304299Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["accessibility","operator","quality-gate","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.065464Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.657487Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.220566Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.843863Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:42.382100Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:35.470733Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"closed_reason":"Implemented ux_scenario_validation.rs: 8 WorkflowClass variants, ScenarioSpec with phased acceptance, ScenarioEvaluator (Pass/Degraded/Fail), UxTelemetry aggregator, GoNoGoEvaluation with 5 release gates, 5 standard scenarios, 36 tests. Committed as dc187351."}
